title: Supplemental material and source data for "Model Epithelia from Rumen Organoids"
author: Khomeijani Farahani, Saeed
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This record contains the supplemental material and source data associated with the manuscript "Model Epithelia from Rumen Organoids". The supplemental PDF includes Supplemental Figures S1–S6 and Supplemental Tables S1–S2, including the Ki-67 quantification workflow, annotated Gene Ontology cellular component cnet plots, butyrate-response qPCR analyses, qPCR primer sequences, and gene annotation information. The supplemental Excel file contains processed RNA-seq source data, including raw count values, FPKM values, enrichment results, Gene Ontology pathway information, and figure-associated datasets supporting the transcriptomic and quantitative analyses presented in the manuscript.
steps_raw: This record contains the supplemental material and source data associated with the manuscript "Model Epithelia from Rumen Organoids". The supplemental PDF includes Supplemental Figures S1–S6 and Supplemental Tables S1–S2, including the Ki-67 quantification workflow, annotated Gene Ontology cellular component cnet plots, butyrate-response qPCR analyses, qPCR primer sequences, and gene annotation information. The supplemental Excel file contains processed RNA-seq source data, including raw count values, FPKM values, enrichment results, Gene Ontology pathway information, and figure-associated datasets supporting the transcriptomic and quantitative analyses presented in the manuscript.
keywords: Sheep; Ovine rumen organoid; Organoid culture; Primary cell culture; RNA sequencing; Transepithelial electrical resistance; Supplemental material; Source data
